description: Lien Filing — records mechanic's liens, tax liens, judgment liens, and HOA liens with statutory deadline tracking and proper notice verification

hard_stops.label: Mechanic's Lien Filing Deadline Expired
hard_stops.logic: Mechanic's lien is being filed after the statutory deadline from completion of work — lien is time-barred and cannot be recorded

hard_stops.label: Preliminary Notice Not Served
hard_stops.logic: Mechanic's lien claimant did not serve the required preliminary notice — lien is invalid without proper notice

hard_stops.label: Lien Amount Exceeds Statutory Limit
hard_stops.logic: Claimed lien amount exceeds the statutory limit for this lien type or exceeds the contract amount — lien may be subject to penalties

soft_flags.label: Multiple Liens on Same Parcel
soft_flags.logic: Parcel already has 3 or more active liens recorded — verify lien priority and notify title companies of complex lien stack
